meaning: n.[微]道诺霉素,正定霉素,红比霉素,柔毛霉素(用作抗肿瘤药)
examples: AIM: To evaluate the pathologic features of rabbit lens posterior capsule cells under the effect of daunomycin.
It had the anti-mutation function that can inhibit mutagenicity of Daunomycin and Methane Sulfonate in strains TA98 and TA100.
The products of this process are important intermediates in the synthesis of daunomycin and its analogs which are useful in the therapy of neoplastic ailments.
